title: lithocarpus microlepis
intro: Lithocarpus microlepis, also known as the dwarf copper beech or Chinese copper beech, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family, Fagaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus microlepis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, such as respiratory and urinary tract infections. In herbal preparations, Lithocarpus microlepis is often made into a decoction, powder, or extract, and is commonly used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
